name: Peach Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in the butter until crumbs form.
3. In a separate bowl, combine milk, vanilla, and egg; stir into the flour mixture until moistened.
4. Spread the dough evenly into an 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Arrange the sliced peaches in rows and press them lightly into the dough.
6. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
